context: Alarm Responses accounts for 61% of calls.
brief_text:
**ACTIVITY INDEX — Week of Dec 28–Jan 03**
*(Data updated Jan 20 — typical 14-day lag)*

**Status:** QUIET — 26 security-related calls in Hollywood Division

**Call Breakdown:**
• Alarm Responses: 16 calls (61%)
• Burglary Related: 5 calls (19%)
• Trespass: 3 calls (11%)
• Theft: 2 calls (7%)

Tracking 37% below 8-week average (26 vs 41).
